title: Vision & Goals
vision: To build simple, reliable systems that solve real operational problems by combining strong software engineering with affordable and accessible hardware.

shortTerm: Strengthen backend-focused full stack development with emphasis on system design and reliability.
Build a solid foundation in IoT and Embedded Systems using ESP8266/ESP32.
Improve proficiency in C/C++ for low-level and hardware interaction.
Develop projects that integrate backend systems with physical devices.
Enhance debugging skills across software and hardware systems.
Validate ideas through small, fast prototypes before scaling.
longTerm: Build complete end-to-end systems combining software and hardware.
Design and launch practical products based on real-world validation.
Create affordable solutions for students and small-scale environments.
Develop strong product thinking grounded in real usage and feedback.
Build systems that are scalable, maintainable, and easy to use.
Balance independent execution with effective team collaboration.

values: Solve real problems, not just features
Stay consistent over chasing quick results
